debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
δL : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → ℝ
hδL0 : δL 0 = 0
h : ClassicalMechanics.Lagrangian.IsTotalTimeDerivative n fun x v x_1 => δL v
⊢ ∃ g, ∀ (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), δL v = inner ℝ g v

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨F, hF, h_eq⟩ := h
  use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  intro v
  have h1 := h_eq 0 v 0
  have h2 := h_eq 0 0 0
  simp at h2
  have h3 := h_eq 0 v 1
  simp at h3
  have h4 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    rw [add_comm]
    exact (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_add (v, 0) (0, 1)
  rw [← h1, ← h3, h4] at *
  simp_all

  have h1 := h_eq 0 v 0
  have h2 := h_eq 0 0 0
  simp at h2

  simp [hδL0] at h3
  have h4 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    rw [← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0)), ← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1))]
    exact (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_add (v, 0) (0, 1)

    have h6 := h_eq 0 0 1
    simp at h6
    have h7 := h_eq 0 0 0
    simp at h7
    linarith
  rw [h5] at h1
  simpa [h5] using h1

obtain ⟨F, hF, hδL⟩ := h
  use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  intro v
  have h1 := hδL 0 v 0
  have h2 := hδL 0 0 0
  simp at h2
  have h3 := congr_arg (fun x => x - δL 0) h2
  simp [hδL0] at h3
  have h4 := hδL 0 v 1
  have h5 := hδL 0 v (-1)
  simp at h4 h5
  have h6 := hδL 0 (v + v) 0
  simp at h6
  have h7 := hδL 0 (2 • v) 0
  simp at h7
  have h8 := hδL 0 (v - v) 0
  simp at h8
  have h9 := hδL 0 0 1
  simp at h9
  have h10 := hδL 0 0 (-1)
  simp at h10
  have h11 := hδL 0 v t
  have h12 := hδL r v t
  have h13 := hδL r 0 t
  have h14 := hδL r v 0
  have h15 := hδL r v 1
  have h16 := hδL r v (-1)
  have h17 := hδL 0 v t
  have h18 := hδL r 0 0
  have h19 := hδL r 0 1
  have h20 := hδL r 0 (-1)
  have h21 := hδL 0 0 t
  have h22 := hδL r v t
  have h23 := hδL r v t
  have h24 := hδL r v t
  have h25 := hδL r v t
  have h26 := hδL r v t
  have h27 := hδL r v t
  have h28 := hδL r v t
  have h29 := hδL r v t
  have h30 := hδL r v t
  exact by
    have hF' : Differentiable ℝ F := hF
    have hF'' : ∀ r v t, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) := hδL
    have hF''' : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) := fun v => hF'' 0 v 0
    have hF'''' : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
      intro v
      rw [← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0)), ← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1))]
      have h_add : (v, 1) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) := by ext <;> simp
      rw [h_add, fderiv_add hF']
    have h_const : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by
      have h_t_indep : ∀ t, fderiv ℝ F (0, t) (0, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
        intro t
        have h_t_indep' : ∀ r v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) := hδL r v t
        have h_t_indep'' : ∀ r v, fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (r, 0) (v, 1) := by
          intro r v
          have h1 := hδL r v t
          have h2 := hδL r v 0
          simp_all
        simp_all
      have h_t_indep''' : ∀ t, fderiv ℝ F (0, t) (0, 1) = δL 0 - fderiv ℝ F (0, t) (0, 0) := by
        intro t
        have h1 := hδL 0 0 t
        simp_all
      have h_t_indep'''' : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = δL 0 := by
        have h1 := hδL 0 0 0
        simp_all
      simp_all
    have h_linear : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) := by
      intro v
      rw [hF'''', h_const]
    use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
    intro v
    rw [h_linear]
    have h_inner : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) = inner ℝ (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)) v := by
      apply PiL2.inner_apply
    exact h_inner

obtain ⟨F, hF, h_eq⟩ := h
  use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  intro v
  have h1 := h_eq 0 v 0
  have h2 := h_eq 0 0 0
  simp at h2
  have h3 := h_eq 0 v 1
  simp at h3
  have h4 := h_eq 0 0 1
  simp at h4
  have h5 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    apply congr_arg
    simp [add_prod]
  rw [← h5] at h1
  simp at h1
  have h6 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by
    have h7 : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
      rw [h_eq 0 0 1]
      simp
    rw [hδL0] at h7
    exact h7
  rw [h6] at h1
  simp at h1
  exact h1

obtain ⟨F, hF, h_eq⟩ := h
  use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  intro v
  have h1 := h_eq 0 v 0
  have h2 := h_eq 0 0 0

  have h3 := h_eq 0 v 1
  simp at h3
  have h4 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    rw [add_comm]
    exact (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_add (v, 0) (0, 1)
  rw [← h1, ← h3, h4] at h2
  simp at h2
  linarith

obtain ⟨F, hF, hδL⟩ := h
  have h1 : ∀ r v t, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) := hδL
  have h2 : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) := fun v ↦ by
    specialize h1 0 v 0
    exact h1
  let g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := fderiv ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ ↦ F x) (0, 0) ⟨·, 0⟩
  use g
  intro v
  have h3 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    rw [← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0)), ← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1))]
    simp [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]
    exact (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_add _ _
  have h4 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by
    have h5 : ∀ t, δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, t) (0, 1) := fun t ↦ h1 0 0 t
    simp [hδL0] at h5
    have h6 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := rfl
    have h7 : ∀ t, fderiv ℝ F (0, t) (0, 1) = 0 := fun t ↦ by simpa [hδL0] using h5 t
    exact h7 0
  have h8 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) := by
    rw [h3, h4, zero_add]
  have h9 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
    rfl
  rw [h2, h8, h9]

obtain ⟨F, hF, hδL⟩ := h
  use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  intro v
  have h1 := hδL 0 v 0
  have h2 := hδL 0 0 0
  simp at h2
  have h3 := congr_arg (fun x => x - δL 0) h2
  simp [hδL0] at h3
  have h4 := hδL 0 v 1
  have h5 := hδL 0 v (-1)
  simp at h4 h5
  have h6 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = δL v := by
    specialize hδL 0 v 0
    simp at hδL
    exact hδL
  have h7 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by
    specialize hδL 0 0 0
    simp [hδL0] at hδL
    exact hδL
  have h8 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) = δL v := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero]
    have h9 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) - fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = δL v - 0 := by
      rw [h6, h7]
    simpa using h9
  simp [h8]

obtain ⟨F, hF, hδL⟩ := h
  use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  intro v
  have h1 := hδL 0 v 0
  have h2 := hδL 0 0 0
  simp at h2
  have h3 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    rw [show (v, 1) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) by ext <;> simp]
    exact (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_add _ _
  rw [h1, h3]
  have h4 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = δL 0 := by
    rw [← hδL 0 0 0, show (0, 1) = (0, 1) by rfl]
  rw [h4, hδL0]
  simp

obtain ⟨F, hF, h_eq⟩ := h
  use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  intro v
  have h1 := h_eq 0 v 0
  have h2 := h_eq 0 0 0
  simp at h2
  have h3 := congr_arg (fun x => x - δL 0) h1
  simp [hδL0] at h3
  have h4 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    apply Eq.symm
    rw [← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0)), ← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1))]
    exact (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_add (v, 0) (0, 1)
  rw [h4] at h1
  have h5 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by
    have h_temp := h_eq 0 0 1
    simp at h_temp
    have h_temp2 := h_eq 0 0 0
    simp at h_temp2
    linarith
  rw [h5] at h1
  simp_all

obtain ⟨F, hF, h_eq⟩ := h
  have h_diff := hF
  let g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := fun i => fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (Pi.single i 1, 0)
  use g
  intro v
  have h1 := h_eq 0 v 0
  simp at h1
  have h2 := h_eq 0 0 0
  simp at h2
  have h3 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    rw [← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0)), ← zero_add (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1))]
    exact (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_add (v, 0) (0, 1)
  rw [h3] at h1
  have h4 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by
    have h5 := h_eq 0 0 1
    simp at h5
    have h6 := h_eq 0 0 0
    simp at h6
    linarith
  rw [h4] at h1
  have h7 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
    simp [g, inner_pi]
    congr
    ext i
    simp [Pi.single_apply]
  rw [h7] at h1
  exact h1

obtain ⟨F, hF, h_eq⟩ := h
  use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  intro v
  have h1 := h_eq 0 v 0
  have h2 := h_eq 0 0 0
  simp at h2
  have h3 := congr_arg (fun x => x - δL 0) h1
  simp [hδL0] at h3
  have h4 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    rw [← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0)), ← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1))]
    exact (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_add _ _
  rw [h4] at h1
  have h5 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by
    have h_temp := h_eq 0 0 1
    simp at h_temp
    linarith
  rw [h5] at h1
  simp_all

obtain ⟨F, hF, hδL⟩ := h
  have h1 : ∀ r v t, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) := hδL
  have h2 : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) := fun v => by
    specialize h1 0 v 0
    exact h1
  have h3 : ∀ v, fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    intro v
    rw [← add_zero v, ← add_zero (1 : ℝ)]
    simp [add_left_inj]
  have h4 : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := fun v => by
    rw [h2, h3]
  have h5 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by
    have := h4 0
    simp [hδL0] at this
    exact this
  have h6 : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) := fun v => by
    rw [h4, h5]
    simp
  let g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) ∘ (·, (0 : ℝ))
  refine' ⟨g, fun v => _⟩
  simp [g, h6]
  <;> rfl

obtain ⟨F, hF, h_eq⟩ := h
  use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  intro v
  have h1 := h_eq 0 v 0
  have h2 := h_eq 0 0 0
  simp at h1 h2
  have h3 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    rw [← add_right_inj (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1))]
    simp [add_comm]
  rw [h1, h2] at h3
  simp_all

obtain ⟨F, hF, h_eq⟩ := h
  have h1 : ∀ r v t, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) := h_eq
  have h2 : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) := fun v => by
    specialize h1 0 v 0
    exact h1
  let g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  use g
  intro v
  have h3 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    apply congr_arg
    simp [Prod.add_def]
  rw [h2, h3]
  have h4 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = δL 0 := by
    specialize h1 0 0 0
    simp at h1
    exact h1.symm ▸ rfl
  rw [h4, hδL0]
  simp [g]

obtain ⟨F, hF, h_eq⟩ := h
  have h1 : ∀ r v t, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) := h_eq
  have h2 : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) := fun v ↦ by
    specialize h1 0 v 0
    exact h1
  let g := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  use g
  intro v
  have h3 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    rw [← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0)), ← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1))]
    simp [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]
    apply congrArg
    ext
    simp [Pi.add_apply]
  have h4 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = δL 0 := by
    specialize h1 0 0 0
    simpa using h1
  rw [h2, h3, h4, hδL0]
  simp [g]

obtain ⟨F, hF, h_eq⟩ := h
  use fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (·, 0)
  intro v
  have h1 := h_eq 0 v 0
  have h2 := h_eq 0 0 0
  simp at h2
  have h3 := congr_arg (fun x => x - δL 0) h2
  simp [hδL0] at h3
  have h4 := h_eq 0 v 1
  simp at h4
  have h5 := h_eq 0 0 1
  simp at h5
  have h6 := congr_arg (fun x => x - δL 0) h5
  simp [hδL0] at h6
  have h7 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := by
    apply Eq.symm
    rw [← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0)), ← add_zero (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1))]
    apply congr_arg
    ext
    simp [Pi.add_apply, Pi.zero_apply]
  rw [h1, h7] at *
  have h8 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by
    linarith
  rw [h8] at h1
  simp_all
